target.title: fix(control-ui): recognize namespaced reasoning tags in thinking extraction
target.body:
## Problem
`extractThinking()` in the Control UI only recognized bare legacy text-block tags such as `<think>` / `<thinking>`. Other parts of the UI already strip/suppress the broader reasoning-tag family, including namespaced MiniMax-style tags such as `<mm:thinking>`.

When a model emits a namespaced reasoning block, the Control UI fallback path can leave the reasoning text in the visible answer instead of extracting it into the thinking section.

## Fix
Extend the legacy text-block extraction pattern to recognize namespaced reasoning tags while preserving the existing bare-tag behavior.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: a message containing namespaced reasoning tags is now split into thinking content and visible answer content instead of leaking the reasoning block into the assistant response.

**Focused verification run on this branch**:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/message-extract.test.ts` -> 1 file / 8 tests passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint ui/src/ui/chat/message-extract.ts ui/src/ui/chat/message-extract.test.ts` -> clean

The focused test covers the changed `extractThinking()` behavior directly, including the namespaced tag case and existing extraction behavior.

## Scope
Small Control UI parser-only change. No runtime API, storage, or protocol changes.
